assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 8 shows 'Last-Updated timestamp: 2026-06-28T10:00:00Z' extracted from 'security-matrix-mock.md' (the eval mock of security-matrix.md). The ISO 8601 timestamp was successfully parsed and used for the age calculation (8 days), demonstrating the timestamp was read from the matrix file.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 3: 'Result: PASS (within threshold -- proceed silently)'. Lines 9-11 show Age: 8 days vs Threshold: 14 days. Lines 22-23: 'The security matrix Last-Updated timestamp (2026-06-28) is 8 days old, which is within the 14-day staleness threshold. No staleness warning is displayed.'

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 26-27: 'when the matrix is within the threshold, the check is silent on success -- no user interaction is required and no warning is emitted.' No user prompts, options, or interactive elements appear anywhere in the staleness-check output. The result is purely informational logging with no user-facing warnings.

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 24: 'Triage proceeds silently to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption.' Additionally, data-extraction.md demonstrates 'Step 1 -- Data Extraction' was executed, confirming the workflow continued past Step 0.5 without being blocked by the staleness check.
